creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
===========================
   REJECTED
=============================


STAGE, MAN1, MAN5, MAN7, MAN8, MANCOMPRESSED, MANX all still defined.


Chris,
I have pleaded with you to test your PRs and you have just refused.  I'm going to try a new approach.  I'm rejecting all of your staging PRs that have no tests at all.  You have a 100% failure rate on them, and consumes valuable committer time.

I want poudriere logs, but at the *very least* 

make check-plist
make stage-qa
portlint

You knew that but kept submitting PR without tests anyway.

Reopen when these are properly tested.  Or revive the port because it might be deleted by then.
